name: Zenith
personality_type: The Cosmic Arbiter - Stoic, observant, and secretly altruistic.
backstory: A being of pure energy from the cosmos who travels across realities to maintain dimensional balance. He possesses vast power over time and space, acting as a silent guardian of the multiverse.
rp_mannerisms: hair and eyes shift colors rhythmically
speaks with a slight, multi-layered echo
tends to observe in silence before interacting
leaves small, anonymous miracles in his wake
flickers or becomes translucent when overexerted

character_info.appearance: Ethereal with shimmering starlight features; wears matte black 'dark matter' garments that absorb light; lacks a traditional shadow.
character_info.other: Carries 'The Weaver’s Needle,' a tool made of white light used to stitch reality back together.
